name: Shrimp with Garlic Cream Sauce Over Linguine
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces fresh linguine, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a saucepan of water to a boil.
2. Remove the vein from each shrimp and rinse under running water.
3. Add the peeled garlic cloves to the boiling water and cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add the shrimp to the water and cook with the garlic for 2-3 more minutes.
5. Drain the shrimp and garlic, then peel the garlic and finely chop it.
6. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Add the chopped garlic and cook for 1 minute.
8. Pour in the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
9. Cook until the cream begins to thicken, stirring occasionally.
10. Stir in the parsley, Parmesan, and shrimp; season with salt and pepper.
11. Toss the sauce over the cooked linguine to coat evenly.
12. Garnish with additional parsley and Parmesan.
Yield: 2 servings
